Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x431B "POOYAN-0B00-431B" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0b00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pooyan.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0B00 to set $7F in ZP to #$C6 to allow the game to run.
